violations.text: A chemical spray bottle was observed hanging on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed bottle. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025
The ice bucket was observed not stored inverted. PIC inverted and placed on a pan. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

An accumulation of dirt and leaf debris was observed in the dumpster enclosure, with overgrown plants in the raised area behind the dumpster. Refuse area shall be maintained free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2025
Dirt and debris were observed in the dumpster area. Refuse areas must be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2025
